options.name: --force
options.description:
Forces the manifest to be generated even if vault
validation fails.

options.name: --ignore-file
options.description:
Sets a file to be ignored when generating the manifest.
Can be called multiple times.

options.name: --ignore-folder
options.description:
Sets a folder to be ignored when generating the manifest.
Can be called multiple times.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The path to the output folder to write the manifest
to.

arguments.name: vault-path
arguments.description:
The path to the Molten Obsidian vault to generate a 
manifest for.

options.name: --from-folder
options.description: Path to the local moltenobsidian vault

options.name: --from-url
options.description:
Full url to the manifest file for remote
vault

options.name: --ignored-files
options.description:
Ignore these files when creating the static
site.

options.name: --ignored-folders
options.description:
Ignore an entire directoroy when creating the static
site.

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Directory to write the output files to
